name: EagleRoad:WorldRise
short_description: This is an open world 3D gunfight game based on the law of the jungle, which emphasizes the survival of the fittest. It is also a mission centered combat game based on experience leveling. It combines elements of role-playing, tactical strategy, and experience leveling.

name: Blood Welkin

name: Nights at the Convenience Store
short_description: Nights at the Convenience Store is a first-person horror simulation game where you work the night shift at a 24/7 store. Scan groceries, restock shelves, take out the trash — and try not to think too hard about what's lurking in the back.

name: Fortune Fragments

name: Trashy Cashy

name: Hell Forest
short_description: Hell Forest is a digital board game. In Hellwood, you take on the role of a strategic commander, leading a magnificent, non-violent war. With limited resources, you will use your wisdom to claim victory in one region after another.

name: Bartender Life Simulator
short_description: What is a bar owner to you? A manager? A bartender? An interior designer? A psychologist? And what if you had to take on all these roles? Interact with customers, manage supplies, craft cocktails, and redesign the interior to earn the title of the best bar.

name: AutoClick Pro
short_description: AutoClick Pro is a powerful auto clicker, macro recorder, and scripting tool for SteamOS and other Linux distros. Automate clicks, record mouse and keyboard sequences, and write custom scripts. Native X11 and Wayland support.

name: The Last (Hotdog) Stand
short_description: Run your own hotdog stand in this food cart simulator game! Take orders, make dogs, and keep customers happy as you work to grow your hotdog empire, and restore hotdogs to their former glory. Upgrade your stand, unlock new ingredients, and expand to bigger, busier locations!

name: Battle Food Mania
short_description: Food fights hit the streets! Battle Food Mania is a fast-paced, action game packed with humor and chaos. Play as pizza, cupcakes, bottles and more as you battle to deliver the box - or stop the delivery! Run, shoot and blast your rivals in wild food wars, play solo or with friends.

name: Beatlow
short_description: A fast-paced rhythm game where every mistake costs a life. Hit the right keys in time with the music, survive escalating mutators, buy power-ups, and push your run as far as possible.

name: Extreme Racing Line
short_description: A fast minimalist top-down racer where you push tight lines, skim the edge of the track, and chase faster lap times on fully visible single-screen circuits.

name: Spirimonz
short_description: Spirimonz is a game in which you hunt down evil spirits and capture various ghostly companions who will help you and follow you on every new mission.
